reasoning: Based on multiple polls conducted in February and March 2026 (just weeks before the March 22 election), the AfD is consistently polling in third place with approximately 17-19% of the vote. The CDU and SPD are much further ahead, engaged in a neck-and-neck race with around 26-29% of the vote. Since the knowledge cutoff is just one week before the election, closing a 9-10 point gap against two separate major parties is virtually impossible, barring an unprecedented polling failure. The market price reflects this extreme improbability at 1%. I am forecasting the lowest allowable probability of 0.02.
